news.title: ChatGPT just got a 50% cheaper Pro plan to take on Anthropic’s Claude
news.description: OpenAI has announced a cheaper ChatGPT Pro plan that costs 50% less than before and is designed for heavy users.

news.title: OpenAI has a new $100 ChatGPT Pro plan to better match up with Claude
news.description: OpenAI has closed a yawning gap in its ChatGPT subscription pricing with a new $100 per month Pro plan that slots between the $20 per month Plus plan and $200 per month Pro plan. Offering five times more Codex than the $20 option, it appears designed to chall…

news.title: China AI Firm Discloses $92 Million of Banned Nvidia Chip Servers to Beijing
news.description: Hours after the United States charged a Super Micro Computer Inc. co-founder with illegally smuggling billions of dollars’ worth of Nvidia Corp. AI chips to China, shares of a little-known Shenzhen-based computing company plummeted by the daily limit of 20%.

news.title: OpenAI has quietly launched its ads manager as it races to build out its ads business
news.description: The AI platform quietly launched its ads manager within its ChatGPT ads pilot advertisers last week, and also lowered the barrier to joining the test.

news.title: Anthropic reportedly explores in-house chip design amid rapid revenue growth and evolving AI compute stack

news.title: Claude Cowork : Completely Automate Your Recurring Workflows
